headline: OpenAI's data center pivot underscores Wall Street spending concerns ahead of IPO
summary: As OpenAI gears up for a potential IPO, it's outlined a more tempered infrastructure strategy and has moved away from an ambitious agreement with Nvidia.

headline: Constellation Energy Vote Tests Investor Expectations On DEI And Governance
summary: Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) faces a shareholder proposal on its diversity, equity, and inclusion approach. Investors are set to vote on the DEI related resolution at the upcoming annual shareholders meeting. The proposal focuses on how the company designs, evaluates, and reports its DEI initiatives. Constellation Energy, a major player in the U.S. power sector, is drawing attention as investors put its DEI policies under the microscope. For a company that operates in a highly...
